narrative: Pearl is a month-old L1 shipping at a fast clip — the core monorepo took 6 commits this week and the bridge frontend + non-custodial wallet shipped 28 and 37 commits respectively in the same window, including a v0.2.8 Armory-style offline signing surface in PearlWallet. Network hashpower sits at ~221 TH/s against ~6.2M difficulty with ~121s block intervals at height 61,212. The bridge holds 173,462 PRL in custody backing 171,213 WPRL minted on Ethereum (a healthy ~1.3% surplus reserve), and WPRL trades around $0.54 on Uniswap, up ~22% on the day on thin liquidity. The catalog stays small but real: one explorer, one wallet, one pool, the bridge, plus the L1 site and compute marketplace — four-ish independent shipped artifacts rather than vapor announcements.

anomalies: first snapshot with populated fields — previous ecosystem.json was schema scaffolding with nulls, so no prior baseline to compare 24h deltas against

github.last_commit_msg: bug fix for bitcoin utils package serializing OP_PUSHDATA1 opcode (#115)
merge next → main: api proxy failover + SWR
v0.2.8: Armory-style offline signing — watcher / signer / broadcaster
